name: whiteboard-ink
title: Whiteboard Ink
description: A whiteboard sketch draws one measured stroke at a time while a pen nib follows the active tip. Preset sketches (bulb, flow, rocket) or your own multi-stroke SVG paths via the strokes slot; a path marked data-ink=accent rides the accent token.
evidence: Video Primitives Wave I I8 whiteboard-ink contract; Wave J U-W strokes slot

variables.label: Sketch
variables.description: Authored preset sketch to draw. Ignored when the strokes slot holds custom paths.

variables.label: Caption
variables.description: Short line shown after the sketch completes.

variables.label: Pen
variables.description: Show or hide the pen nib actor.

variables.label: Accent
variables.description: Color used by strokes marked data-ink=accent (one highlight stroke in each preset).

variables.label: Exit
variables.description: How the completed lockup leaves. none holds the final frame.
